name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗 Mini Crescent bag, original color raffia weave material. Brown leather trim, accented with vintage gold metal FENDI lettering. Zipper closure, fabric lined interior pocket, with gold-finish metal hardware. Clasp can be used as a handle, or worn crossbody with an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap
Size 20cm
Style 8081
